name: O.G.R.R. Whipper Earwig
description: The O.G.R.R. Whipper Earwig pushes the mix of tail sweeps, rocks, and awkward defense even further. More than simply damaging you head-on, it is built to break your rhythm and leave you badly positioned for everything else.
behavior: Both O.G.R.R. earwigs share the same locations: inside the scarecrow pumpkin and in the cave between the statue shrubs and the greenhouse. The cave route is tied to releasing the lab and the nighttime cycle, but the scarecrow spawn itself is not night-only.
interactionWithPlayer: It is especially irritating at mid-range, where it can force tail or rock reactions with almost no breathing room. If you react late once, it usually buys the next awkward sequence for free.
interactionWithCreatures: It often sits behind tougher variants and punishes you from awkward angles. It does not need to be the main threat if it is already the piece scrambling everything you try to do.
strategy: Do not hand over mid-range for free. Force it to commit, read the sweep or rock direction cleanly, and punish only once it has truly overextended.
environments: After releasing the O.G.R.Rs. in the Scarecrow Lab
Cave between the Statue Shrubs and the Greenhouse

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A three-hit series with very little downtime between swings.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A long sequence that keeps pressure going unless you break the rhythm.

abilities.name: Charged Pinch
abilities.description: A heavy pinch attack that punishes weak defense.

abilities.name: Tail Whip
abilities.description: A rear sweep used to cover targets outside the front arc.

abilities.name: Rock Throw
abilities.description: A ranged throw used to force movement and break your rhythm.
